language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the application interface language. Your choice is stored on this device.

lockScreen.heroTitle: See your security posture before opening the vault.
lockScreen.heroDescription: AegisVault brings your master password, device secret, and local encrypted database into one clear, auditable security model.
lockScreen.highlightLocalDescription: Vault records remain encrypted in local storage without being sent to a cloud account.
lockScreen.highlightOfflineDescription: The unlock flow verifies access on the device without depending on an external session service.
lockScreen.highlightTwoPartDescription: The master password is not enough on its own; the device secret acts as a second protection layer.
lockScreen.setupDescription: A two-part, high-security local protection layer inspired by 1Password architecture.
lockScreen.onboardingDescription: Complete these steps once before storing important records.
lockScreen.onboardingStepPassword: Create a strong master password you can remember.
lockScreen.onboardingStepSecret: Save the generated device secret outside this app.
lockScreen.onboardingStepBackup: Download the emergency kit and keep it offline.
lockScreen.existingVaultWarning: Your current vault is already active. Saving a new Master Password and Device Secret here will reset the locked encrypted data in your vault.
lockScreen.passwordWarning: Note: if you forget this password, you cannot access your data again. There is no recovery.
lockScreen.secretKeyDescription: Even if attackers learn your master password, they cannot open your vault from another browser without this device secret.
lockScreen.rememberSecretSetup: Remember the secret on this device

biometric.reason: Verify your identity to unlock your AegisVault vault.

lockScreen.loginDescription: Enter your Master Password and Security Secret to gain access.
lockScreen.secretKeyHelp: The Secret Key is the 1Password-style security key generated when you set up the vault, in A3-XXXX-XXXX... format.
lockScreen.footer: End-to-end sandboxed local crypto algorithm is active.

errors.passwordTooShort: The master password must be at least 12 characters long.
errors.passwordPolicy: The master password must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol characters.
errors.setupFirst: Create a new vault and generate a password first.
errors.missingConfig: Vault configuration is missing. Please refresh the page and set it up again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid Master Password or Device Secret. The entered keys do not match.
errors.unlockDelay: Too many failed unlock attempts. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
errors.unlockLocked: Too many failed unlock attempts. Vault unlock is locked for {{minutes}} minutes.
errors.resetConfirm: Reset the vault? Your saved database will be permanently deleted and set up again.

logs.setupCompleted: Master vault password and Device Secret Key were set up successfully.
logs.vaultUnlocked: AegisVault locked vault was opened successfully with the admin password.
logs.biometricUnlocked: Vault opened with hardware biometric unlock.
logs.unlockDelayed: Unlock backoff activated after {{attempts}} failed attempts. Next attempt allowed in {{seconds}} seconds.
logs.unlockLocked: Vault unlock locked for 5 minutes after {{attempts}} failed attempts.
logs.localReset: All local keys and the database were reset to reconfigure the vault.

emergencyKit.title: AEGISVAULT - EMERGENCY SAFETY CARD
emergencyKit.description: This card contains your device secret key so you can access your AegisVault password vault.
emergencyKit.storeOffline: PLEASE STORE THIS FILE OFFLINE IN A SECURE LOCATION.
emergencyKit.neverShare: For your security, never share this information with anyone.

addEntry.title: New Vault Item
addEntry.description: A high-security local encryption class aligned with 1Password-style architecture.
addEntry.cryptoPasskeyDescription: Unique keys encrypted according to the FIDO2 / WebAuthn standard.
addEntry.passkeyRegistrationFailed: Passkey registration could not be completed.
addEntry.fullNamePlaceholder: full name exactly as shown on the ID
addEntry.dropFileDescription: All file extensions are supported (max. 200MB). The file is encrypted on your device and stored in IndexedDB.
addEntry.encryptingFileDescription: Splitting into asymmetric parts and writing to the local AES-256 library.
addEntry.notesPlaceholder: Add secret details, recovery codes, or encrypted reminders for this item

fileErrors.tooLarge: File size cannot exceed the 200MB limit.
fileErrors.uploadUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred while uploading the file.

generator.title: Password Generator
generator.description: Generate a cryptographically strong random password locally.
generator.cleanWordlistDescription: Filters symbols, numbers, very short entries, repeated filler, and predictable password terms for cleaner passphrases.
generator.fullWordlistDescription: Uses the complete source wordlist without product filtering. Entropy remains calculated from the active list size.
generator.dicewareDescription: Generates a memorable passphrase by randomly selecting independent words from a 7,776-entry Diceware list.
generator.dicewareEntropy: Estimated Diceware entropy: {{bits}} bits. Word selection uses unbiased Web Crypto randomness.
generator.warningDescription: All password generation happens in your browser's isolated local crypto module and is never sent to the network.
generator.strengthDescription: Modern supercomputers would need billions of years to crack a password with this structure.

trash.title: Trash
trash.retention: Items Are Permanently Deleted After 15 Days
trash.clearConfirm: Do you want to permanently delete ALL items in trash? This action cannot be undone.
trash.serviceBefore: Passwords, cards, and secure notes in this area are temporarily frozen. You can restore items to the main vault with their original security properties
trash.serviceMiddle: or delete them without leaving a trace
trash.deleteConfirm: Do you want to permanently delete "{{title}}" completely? This action cannot be undone.
trash.emptyDescription: No deleted records were found. Deleted passwords will be temporarily sent to this storage area.

audit.title: Security Audit
audit.description: Real-time crypto analysis report for password strength, reuse risks, and database integrity across all saved vault passwords.
audit.healthDescription: General coefficient based on password strength, reuse, and leak checks.
audit.reusedDescription: Record groups that use the same password across multiple accounts and create chained breach risk.
audit.weakDescription: Records with insufficient length or complexity that should be reviewed.
audit.masterDescription: Cryptographic resistance check for the local unlock password.
audit.masterStrong: Your master password is verified without being stored. AegisVault keeps only hardened credential metadata for unlock checks.
audit.masterWeak: Your current master password is {{count}} characters long. We strongly recommend using at least 12 characters for stronger offline password resistance.
audit.duplicateDescription: Account groups sharing the same password and creating a cybersecurity exposure.
audit.noDuplicatesDescription: All vault records use independent, unique passwords.
audit.weakListDescription: Account passwords that are 12 characters or fewer and not suitable for strong cybersecurity.
audit.noWeakDescription: All vault records exceed the minimum 12-character threshold used by this audit.
audit.pwnedTitle: Have I Been Pwned k-Anonymity Scan
audit.pwnedDescription: Checks saved login passwords against the Pwned Passwords range API without sending the password or full SHA-1 hash.
audit.pwnedPrivacyNote: AegisVault hashes each password locally with SHA-1, sends only the first 5 hash characters to HIBP, downloads padded suffix matches, and compares the full hash locally.
audit.pwnedNoFindingsDescription: Run the scan to check current login passwords against HIBP. Clean results will remain at zero.
audit.pwnedScanCompletedLog: HIBP k-anonymity scan completed: {{checked}} checked, {{breached}} exposed.
audit.rotationDescription: Generate fresh local replacement values for weak or reused login passwords. Change the password on the service first, then update the saved vault record.
audit.rotationNoAction: No immediate weak or reused login password rotation is recommended.
audit.sandboxDescription: Offline air-gap integrity verification for the application.
audit.sandboxVerified: WebCrypto API integration runs inside browser sandbox boundaries. The SQLite database is local-first and the default runtime blocks external network requests.

detail.encryptedFileMissing: Encrypted file was not found in the local database.
detail.decryptFailed: Decryption failed or the file could not be read.
detail.moveToTrashConfirm: Do you want to move "{{title}}" to trash?
detail.protectedDescription: This item is protected in your local vault with an AES-256-GCM symmetric key tunnel.

secureShare.title: Create Secure Share
secureShare.description: Create a password-sealed offline transfer file for "{{title}}" only.
secureShare.passwordRequired: Set a transfer password with at least 4 characters.
secureShare.expiresHint: Expired bundles are rejected before decryption.
secureShare.warning: Send the JSON file and the transfer password through separate channels. Anyone with both can import this record.
secureShare.failed: Secure share bundle could not be created.

fields.notesPlaceholder: Add private documents for this item
fields.noAttachment: No file attachment is linked to this record.
fields.passkeyRegistered: Passkey credential was registered with the authenticator.
fields.passkeyRegistrationFailed: Passkey registration could not be completed.
fields.passkeyVerificationFailed: Passkey verification could not be completed.

fileErrors.tooLarge: File size cannot exceed the 200MB limit.
fileErrors.saveFailed: Error: File could not be saved to the library.
fileErrors.uploadFailed: An error occurred while uploading the file.

profile.title: Profile & Session Info
profile.choosePhoto: Click to choose a new profile photo
profile.imageUrl: Or Image Link From the Web (URL)
profile.secureStorageNotice: Your signing and verification keys are stored in a sealed local device sandbox. Profile changes are saved to browser memory with secure encryption.

logsModal.title: Local Security Log (Audit)
logsModal.empty: No security actions have been recorded yet.
logsModal.notice: Security logs are kept entirely in local memory and are never sent to a remote server. Recent actions are recovered from local memory after refresh.

database.title: Database Management & Backup
database.subtitle: Crypto-proof encrypted backup and universal migration panel
database.selectImportRecord: Please select at least one record from the list to load into your vault.
database.footer: End-to-end sealed cyber protection is active
database.whyNotCloudText: AegisVault keeps the local encrypted database in your browser and does not send it to a cloud service. This reduces remote service exposure, but if browser data is deleted, you cannot access your passwords. For this reason, we strongly recommend saving encrypted documents from the Secure Backup panel at regular intervals.
database.wipeDescription: This action completely deletes all user data, passwords, identities, and records from browser memory and destroys them irreversibly.
database.wipeBackupWarning: Make absolutely sure you have a backup before running this action.
database.wipeConfirmText: A total of {{count}} records in your vault will be destroyed. To confirm, type SIL in uppercase below.
database.wipeLog: The entire local password vault was manually emptied and destroyed.
database.wipeDone: Your main vault has been completely cleared and destroyed.

errors.exportPasswordRequired: Please set a password for encrypted backup.
errors.exportPasswordTooShort: For your security, the backup password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.plainWarningRequired: Please confirm the danger warning before downloading a plain-text backup.
errors.encryptedFileExpected: The selected file does not contain encrypted items. Try the AegisVault Plain Text mode.
errors.importPasswordRequired: Enter the backup password to decrypt the encrypted backup file.
errors.fileIsEncrypted: The backup file is encrypted. Select the AegisVault Encrypted option above to decrypt it.
errors.secureShareExpected: The selected encrypted file is not an AegisVault secure share bundle.
errors.noCompatibleData: No compatible data found. Check the column headers.
errors.legacyKdfConfirm: This backup uses the legacy PBKDF2 compatibility path or has no KDF metadata. Continue only if you trust the file source.
errors.legacyKdfRejected: Legacy PBKDF2 backup import was cancelled.

status.exported: Your backup file was securely prepared in the browser and downloaded.
status.parsed: {{count}} records parsed successfully. Now choose which ones to import.
status.imported: {{count}} records were written to your vault successfully.

logs.imported: New data import completed ({{count}} records). Strategy: {{strategy}}

export.proofNote: * As shown above, your passwords, sites, and secret data were transformed into meaningless encrypted characters. Nobody can decrypt this file without your password.
export.sealedDescription: All data in the backup file is encrypted using the password you set. Even if opened with a text editor, only meaningless encoded data is visible.
export.guideDescription: Use encrypted export for regular backups, keep the backup password separate from the vault password, and verify the downloaded file name before storing it offline.
export.passwordPlaceholder: Set an independent password to encrypt the document
export.responsibilityText: Do not forget this password until you import the backup again. Aegis does not host cloud servers; if you forget it, your backup cannot be decrypted.
export.passwordMismatchInline: ! Passwords do not match. Please try again.
export.plainDangerText: When you create an unencrypted backup, your data is written as plain text with no protection. Anyone with access to the file can read your passwords instantly.
export.acceptDanger: I accept the risks as a responsible expert
export.plainAcceptanceText: I understand that by downloading this unencrypted backup, I am fully responsible for browser and data security.

import.description: Import backup files exported from Bitwarden, 1Password, KeePass, LastPass, Chrome, and custom CSV sources directly into your AegisVault vault. Column names are analyzed automatically.
import.guideDescription: Choose the source first, parse the file locally, review selected records, then import with merge unless you intentionally want to replace the vault.
import.dropFile: Drag or Select the Exported File Here
import.mergeDescription: Existing passwords are preserved; new ones are added alongside them.
import.replaceDescription: Deletes all current passwords and loads only these records.

settingsPage.description: Manage AegisVault local security preferences, encrypted backup engine, and cross-platform transfer panel.
settingsPage.autoLockDescription: The vault locks automatically after the selected period of inactivity.
settingsPage.airgapDescription: Blocks built-in APIs or network requests to establish fully local sealed operation.
settingsPage.encryptedBackupDescription: JSON data is fully wrapped with AES-256-GCM.

secureShare.title: Secure Share
secureShare.passwordHint: Share this password through a separate channel
secureShare.expiresHint: Expired bundles are rejected before decryption.
secureShare.howItWorks: How does the secure share bundle work?
secureShare.explanation: AegisVault creates a local encrypted transfer file containing active records only. The recipient needs this file and the separate share password to open it.

settingsPage.plainJsonDescription: Passwords are stored as open plain-text JSON. Dangerous.
settingsPage.backupPasswordHint: If empty, your master vault password is used
settingsPage.entriesToBackup: {{count}} secure entries will be backed up.
settingsPage.importWizardDescription: Directly and securely integrate backup files exported from Bitwarden, 1Password, KeePass, LastPass, Chrome, and custom CSV sources into your AegisVault vault.

backupGuide.title: Recommended backup routine
backupGuide.description: Prefer encrypted backups, use an independent backup password, and keep the downloaded file in offline storage.

importGuide.title: Controlled import routine
importGuide.description: Parse files locally first, inspect the preview, then import only selected records. Merge mode is safer than replacing the vault.

importReview.title: Import review
importReview.description: {{file}} from {{source}} was parsed locally. Review the evidence below before importing.
importReview.kdfNote: KDF state was checked before import.
importReview.legacyManifest: Legacy bundle v{{version}} without manifest checksum.

importResult.title: Import result report
importResult.description: {{count}} selected record(s) from {{file}} were imported with {{mode}} strategy.

cipherOptions.aesDescription: Authenticated symmetric encryption and integrity verification with the highest data throughput.
cipherOptions.chachaDescription: An ultra-fast cryptography alternative, especially for mobile and ARM processor architectures.

logs.encryptionChanged: Vault encryption standard was successfully updated to "{{value}}" and all records were re-encrypted.
logs.passwordChanged: Main vault password and AES Master key were successfully updated.
logs.diagnosticComplete: Vault security diagnostic completed. System score: {{score}}%
logs.importParsed: {{count}} records were successfully parsed from {{source}} format.
logs.importReplace: Vault was reset and {{count}} external records were imported.
logs.importMerge: {{count}} records were safely added to the current password vault.

alerts.airgapEnabled: Enhanced Offline Mode (Air-Gap) has been enabled. The page will reload automatically to fully apply network sealing protection.
alerts.airgapDisabled: Enhanced Offline Mode has been disabled. The page will reload automatically to remove network restrictions.
alerts.encryptionConfirm:
You are about to change the encryption standard to "{{value}}".

The system will re-encrypt every record in the database with the new encryption algorithm. Please do not close or refresh the page during this process. Do you confirm?
alerts.encryptionChanged: All passwords were successfully re-encrypted with the "{{value}}" algorithm and saved.
alerts.encryptionError: Error: An error occurred while changing the encryption standard: {{message}}
alerts.selectImportRecord: Please select at least one record to import.

passwordChange.tooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters.
passwordChange.policy: New password must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol characters.
passwordChange.mismatch: New password confirmation does not match.
passwordChange.success: Your main vault password was updated successfully.
passwordChange.error: An error occurred while updating the password.

steps: Verifying cryptography engine and hardware acceleration...
Checking SQLite-WASM OPFS database health and table schema...
Starting password strength analysis inside the vault...
Verifying global interceptor state for Air-Gap network sealing...

backupErrors.passwordRequired: Please set an independent password for the encrypted backup.
backupErrors.passwordTooShort: For your security, the backup password must be at least 4 characters.
backupErrors.passwordMismatch: The backup passwords you entered do not match. Please check them.
backupErrors.plainWarningRequired: To download a plain-text backup, confirm the risk warning and tick the checkbox.

importErrors.encryptedExpected: Please upload an encrypted AegisVault backup or choose the AegisVault Plain Text option.
importErrors.importPasswordRequired: Enter the backup password to decrypt this encrypted backup.
importErrors.fileIsEncrypted: This backup file is encrypted. Please select the AegisVault Encrypted Backup option.
importErrors.secureShareExpected: Please upload an AegisVault secure share bundle for this source.
importErrors.noCompatibleData: The file was read, but zero compatible records could be parsed. Check the column names.
importErrors.legacyKdfConfirm: This backup uses the legacy PBKDF2 compatibility path or has no KDF metadata. Continue only if you trust the file source.
importErrors.legacyKdfRejected: Legacy PBKDF2 backup import was cancelled.

settingsPage.importSuccess: {{count}} new records were added to the vault safely and successfully.

masterPassword.title: Change Master Password
masterPassword.description: Update the password used to unlock the vault. For zero-knowledge security, all records in your vault are automatically re-encrypted in the background with your new key.

wipe.title: Factory Settings and Reset
wipe.description: Irreversibly removes the entire local database from browser storage and resets sample records.
wipe.successDescription: The AegisVault local vault was reset successfully and sample records were reloaded.
wipe.confirmText: You are about to clear your entire local password archive. To confirm, type the following word in uppercase:

diagnosticsUi.title: System Status and Diagnostics
diagnosticsUi.notRun: The system has not been analyzed yet. Click the button to run analysis.

healthDashboard.title: Vault Health Dashboard
healthDashboard.description: Live posture summary for password strength, reuse, and long-running records.
healthDashboard.masterWeak: No strong audit evidence yet. Last known length: {{length}}.
healthDashboard.mfaCoverageDetail: {{totp}} login(s) have no TOTP, {{passkey}} login(s) can be considered for passkey upgrade, {{incomplete}} passkey record(s) are incomplete.
healthDashboard.plaintextExportSeen: Plain-text export was created at {{date}}. Rotate exposed secrets if that file left trusted storage.
healthDashboard.noPlaintextExport: No plain-text export recorded on this device.
healthDashboard.reuseAction: Replace {{count}} reused password occurrence(s) with unique values.
healthDashboard.oldAction: Review {{count}} login record(s) older than 180 days.
healthDashboard.mfaAction: Add TOTP to {{count}} login record(s) that still rely on password only.
healthDashboard.plaintextAction: If a plain-text backup was shared or stored outside a trusted device, rotate the affected secrets.

actions.rotateWeak: Highest priority: rotate weak login passwords with generated strong values.
actions.removeReuse: Highest priority: remove reused passwords so one breach cannot open multiple accounts.
actions.reviewOld: Next priority: review older login records and refresh passwords where appropriate.
actions.addMfa: Next priority: add TOTP or passkey coverage to password-only login records.
actions.rotateAfterPlaintext: Plain-text export history exists. Verify where that file was stored and rotate exposed secrets if needed.
actions.auditMaster: Master password audit is missing or weak. Update it before expanding sync or sharing features.
actions.maintain: No immediate password health issue detected. Keep encrypted backups current.

protection.title: About Aegis Protection
protection.description: AegisVault is not a SaaS service. Your information is never stored on cloud servers, scanned, or shared with third parties. Privacy is yours by default.

importTips.title: Import Tips
importTips.bitwarden: When exporting passwords from Bitwarden or 1Password, choose unencrypted JSON or standard CSV.
importTips.offline: The backup file is loaded into the JavaScript engine inside your browser, not to a server, and is parsed fully offline.
importTips.rememberPassword: To restore encrypted AegisVault backups, you must remember the backup password used when creating that backup.

exportModal.successDescription: The file below was downloaded to your computer. The technical output shows that your downloaded data is fully encrypted and contains no plain-text words:
exportModal.proofNote: * As you can see, the "data" field consists of meaningless hex characters. Nobody can decrypt this file without your password.
exportModal.howPasswordWorks: HOW DOES THE ENCRYPTED BACKUP PASSWORD WORK?
exportModal.passwordExplanation: All data in the backup JSON file (passwords, cards, notes) is encrypted inside the browser with the password you set. Someone opening the file in a text editor will only see meaningless random characters. You will be asked for this password when restoring.
exportModal.newBackupPasswordPlaceholder: Independent password only for this backup
exportModal.passwordMismatch: ! The passwords you entered do not match yet.
exportModal.warningText: Never forget this backup password. Aegis does not host a cloud system; if you forget the password, your data will remain locked forever.
exportModal.plainDangerDescription: You selected a plain-text (unencrypted) backup. When downloaded, all passwords, PINs, and secret notes in this file can be read directly in a text editor.
exportModal.plainDangerFollowup: If the file falls into someone else's hands, your entire digital identity may be exposed. AegisVault strongly discourages this method.
exportModal.acceptDangerDescription: I accept responsibility for downloading all my passwords as an unprotected, unencrypted file and for any security exposure that may result.

donatePage.title: Support AegisVault
donatePage.description: Choose a network, copy the verified wallet address, and send only from the matching chain. AegisVault does not load payment trackers or third-party donation widgets.
donatePage.scanAddress: Scan to fill the {{asset}} receiving address.
donatePage.usdtWarning: Send USDT only on Ethereum ERC-20 to this address. Transfers from other networks may be unrecoverable.
donatePage.noteVerify: Always compare the first and last characters before sending.
donatePage.noteNetwork: Use the exact network shown on the selected card.
donatePage.notePrivacy: No external payment widget is loaded; copying happens locally on your device.

dashboard.title: Security Overview
dashboard.subtitle: System fully encrypted and offline
dashboard.allRecordsProtected: All records are protected and strong.
dashboard.localKeysEnabled: Local key stores are enabled for sealed operation.
dashboard.noItemFoundDescription: No local data matches your search query or selected category filter.

logs.securityLogCreated: Local password vault security log was created.
logs.vaultLockedManually: Vault was manually placed into a secure locked state.
logs.autoLockTriggered: Auto Lock triggered: no activity detected for {{minutes}} minutes.
logs.entryAddError: An error occurred while adding the record.
logs.entryTrashError: An error occurred while moving the record to trash.
logs.entryUpdateError: An error occurred while saving changes.
logs.favoriteError: An error occurred while updating favorite status.
logs.entryRestoredLog: "{{title}}" was restored from trash to the main vault.
logs.entryRestoreError: An error occurred while restoring the record.
logs.entryDeletedLog: "{{title}}" was permanently destroyed from the record database.
logs.entryDeleteError: An error occurred while permanently deleting the record.
logs.trashClearedLog: Trash was emptied and {{count}} items were permanently destroyed.
logs.trashClearError: An error occurred while clearing trash.
logs.vaultFactoryReset: AegisVault local vault was reset to factory defaults.
logs.vaultSamplesLoaded: Vault reset and sample records loaded.
logs.vaultResetError: An error occurred while resetting the vault.
logs.importError: An error occurred while importing backup: {{message}}
logs.pwnedScanCompleted: HIBP scan results saved: {{count}} checked, {{breached}} exposed.
logs.pwnedScanError: Breach scan results could not be saved.
logs.databaseWipedLog: Vault database was permanently deleted and the vault was locked.
logs.dataDeleteError: An error occurred while deleting data.
logs.logsClearedRecord: Local software security log was cleared.
logs.clipboardClearFailed: Clipboard auto-clear failed. The secret may still be available in the system clipboard.
logs.clipboardClearFailedToast: Clipboard could not be cleared automatically. Clear it manually.
logs.clipboardSensitiveFlagFailed: Desktop sensitive clipboard flags could not be applied; browser clipboard fallback was used.
